en_definition: a town in northern France on the Strait of Dover that serves as a ferry port to England; in 1347 it was captured by the English king Edward III after a long siege and remained in English hands until it was recaptured by the French king Henry II in 1558
tr_definition: Fransa'nın kuzeyinde, Dover Boğazı kıyısında bulunan ve İngiltere'ye feribot seferlerinin yapıldığı liman kenti.
ru_definition: Город и порт на севере Франции, расположенный у пролива Па-де-Кале, являющийся важным транспортным узлом между Францией и Англией.
